title: Kolatill

{{Quote|This is the Kolatill Council…all New Republic forces, please send assistance immediately. After imprisoning the Imperial governor we have been attacked by TIE bombers. Domaz, our capital, is in flames. Please send emergency medical assistance.|Distress call from Kolatill|<ref name="O" />}}
'''Kolatill''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Kolatill system/Legends|Kolatill system]] within the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. A stopping point for [[Starship/Legends|ships]] plying their business on the [[Trition Trade Route]], the planet was located several [[Standard day/Legends|days]]' travel from the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]]. Noted as one of the sector's major [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] manufacturing centers, Kolatill was ruled by the [[Kolatill Council]] until [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] was appointed to administer the Kathol sector in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the planet was placed under martial law, and most of the repulsorlift industry was ordered to produce combat [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]] for [[Moff Sarne's forces]].

In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], after the successful [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberation]] of Kal'Shebbol by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]], a popular uprising on Kolatill overthrew their Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]], [[Tetrum]], and reinstated the Kolatill [[Council]]. Following this act of defiance, the [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] ''[[Kathol Protector]]'' arrived [[Star system/Legends|in-system]] and deployed [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] to [[Bombing of Domaz|attack]] the capital [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Domaz]], leaving it ruined and aflame. Kolatill sent out a distress call, which was answered by the New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. The vessel provided relief assistance to the planet, and engaged the ''Kathol Protector'' in [[Battle of Kolatill|battle]] after the Imperial vessel returned for a second strike on the world using [[pathogenic bomb]]s. Between the combined efforts of the ''FarStar'', its [[FarStar starfighter squadron|fighter squadron]], and the [[Kolatill Defense Force]], the planet was spared from further devastation.

==Description==
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Kolatill was situated in the [[Kolatill system/Legends|Kolatill system]]<ref name="O" /> of the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]<ref name="TDC" /> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> A modest stopping point on the [[Trition Trade Route]], Kolatill was located forty-six [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] from the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] when traveling with a Class One-rated [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]],<ref name="TDC" /> or ninety-two hours with a Class Two-rated unit.<ref name="O" /> Kolatill was connected to five other [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] via [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]]; the [[Torize system/Legends|Torize system]] was one [[Standard day/Legends|day]] and four hours travel from Kolatill, the [[Aaris system/Legends|Aaris system]] was sixteen hours distant, the [[Charis system/Legends|Charis system]] was twenty-one hours away, the [[Corjain system/Legends|Corjain system]] was a short three hour trip, and fifteen hours were required to transit to the [[Oon Tien system/Legends|Oon Tien system]].<ref name="TDC" />

The planet had a high degree of axial tilt, which led to extreme seasonal variations. Frigid winters lasted for five [[Standard month/Legends|months]], except in the equatorial regions, and swelteringly hot summers lasted almost as long. Both seasons were particularly unpleasant for the inhabitants of the planet. Each day on the planet lasted for twenty-eight standard hours, and a year was 405 [[Local day/Legends|local days]]. The equatorial regions of the planet featured a variety of terrains, including [[Tree/Legends|forests]], [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]], lowlands, plains, and wetlands, and were sparsely populated in comparison to the north. The mountain ranges were untouched by heavy industry, and [[Farm/Legends|agricultural complexes]] were the main source of industry, with the ranching of herd animals such as [[chollas]] and [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]] being the main source of income. The [[Foodstuff/Legends|meat]] and hides fetched good prices in the markets of the northern cities, and were exported to the nearby planets [[Gandle Ott]] and [[Torize]]. [[Fruit/Legends|Fruit]] and [[Vegetable/Legends|vegetable]] growing was prevalent in the wetlands, making Kolatill virtually self-sufficient food-wise. However, the planet did rely on outside trade to bring in higher technology items such as [[Computer/Legends|computers]], processing equipment, medicines, and [[Starship/Legends|starships]].<ref name="O" />

Kolatill's capital [[City/Legends|city]] was [[Domaz]], and its industry was based mainly around [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] manufacturing. The planet was regarded as one of the major producers of [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] and associated equipment in the sector. The northern continental mountain chains were home to numerous [[Mining/Legends|mining]] complexes and repulsorlift [[Factory/Legends|factories]]. [[Ikas-Adno/Legends|Ikas-Adno]], a major manufacturer of repulsorcraft, operated around a dozen factories on the planet, with several local companies such as [[GandleMotors]] and [[Kal'Shebbol Transport]] manufacturing their own designs. The local companies also supplied parts to the Ikas-Adno plants.<ref name="O" />

The planet had a population of 400 million beings, mainly consisting of [[Human/Legends|Humans]], [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]], and [[Jarell]]. The main population centers were located in the northern regions of the planet, near to the main industrial centers and manufacturing plants. Mountain ranges dominated the north, and supplied a steady stream of materials and [[Ore/Legends|ores]] to Kolatill's industrial base. Outside the cities, the wilds were dangerous, with predators prowling the mountain passes and attacking herd animals.<ref name="O" />

==History==
===Controlled by the Galactic Empire===
Kolatill was ruled by the [[Kolatill Council]],<ref name="O" /> until the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] appointed [[Kentor Sarne]] as [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the Kathol sector in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]. Recognizing the potential of the large repulsorlift manufacturing facilities located on the planet, Sarne instituted a despotic regime on the world.<ref name="TDC" /> In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="0 ABY Date">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' is set four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The Battle of Endor is stated to have occurred in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] by ''[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|The Essential Chronology]]'', giving a date of [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] for the events depicted in "[[Omens]]." In "Omens", [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Tetrum]] is stated to have established martial law and imprisoned the [[Kolatill Council]] eight years previously, giving a date of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref> he appointed [[Tetrum]] as the planetary [[Governor/Legends|governor]], who declared the entire planet to be under martial law. The Kolatill Council was arrested and [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]], and all local repulsorlift manufacturing plants were ordered to produce combat [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]] for [[Moff Sarne's forces|Sarne's military forces]]. Only Ikas-Adno, due to its wealth and [[Politics/Legends|political]] connections, was spared from the edict. These changes to the planet's society created a nervous and restless population, one that was sympathetic to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], and later the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. However, Tetrum used an extensive network of [[Spy/Legends|spies]] to identify potential threats and enemy sympathizers.<ref name="O" />

===Self-Liberation===
Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="TEC">The [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] is stated to have occurred in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] according to ''[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|The Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Moff Sarne quietly withdrew the Kathol sector from the fracturing Empire and set himself up as a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]]. As a result, Kolatill, like much of the Kathol sector, became answerable only to Sarne.<ref name="TDC" /> In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],<ref name="8 ABY Date" /> the New Republic launched an [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|assault]] on the planet Kal'Shebbol that liberated the sector capital from Sarne's rule, and forced the Moff to flee into the deep regions of the Kathol sector with the majority of his [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]].<ref name="TSB">{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref> When news of Sarne's defeat at Kal'Shebbol reached Kolatill, the population staged an uprising, overthrowing and jailing Governor Tetrum. The surviving three members of the Kolatill Council were freed, and resumed control of the planet. Their first act was to declare their allegiance to the New Republic. They also managed to acquire six [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] as the beginnings of their own [[Kolatill Defense Force|defense force]].<ref name="O" />

===Imperial Retribution===
Shortly after the planet declared its fealty to the New Republic, the Imperial [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] ''[[Kathol Protector]]'' entered the system and launched [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] toward Kolatill. The [[Bomber/Legends|bombers]] [[Bombing of Domaz|targeted]] the capital of Domaz, leaving much of the city in ruins. Following the assault, the ship broadcast a transmission to the planet, claiming that the attack was a lesson aimed at those who chose to join the New Republic, before withdrawing from the system. Kolatill's government sent out a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signal]] to the New Republic forces stationed at Kal'Shebbol, and the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' intercepted the transmission while in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the planet. The vessel, preparing for a shakedown cruise ahead of a [[DarkStryder Campaign|mission]] to track down Moff Sarne following his flight from the capital, responded immediately to the message. [[Monjai]], the recently appointed New Republic governor of Kal'Shebbol, also promised to deploy [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical ships]] to Kolatill as soon as possible.<ref name="O" />

[[File:Noell_Ciro_death.jpg|thumb|left|230px|Noell Ciro's X-wing rams a TIE bomber during the Battle of Kolatill.]]
The ''FarStar'' arrived at the planet four days after the bombing of Domaz, and rendered all available assistance to the city, assisting in relief operations such as tending to the wounded, recovering medical supplies, distributing food and guarding supply convoys against looters and wild animals. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Keleman Ciro]], [[Commander/Legends|commanding]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the ''FarStar'', engaged in [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] meetings with [[Councillor/Legends|Councillor]] [[Kause]] of the Kolatill Council, which were subsequently broadcast across the planet to increase morale among the population.<ref name="O" />

Shortly after the arrival of the ''FarStar'', the ''Kathol Protector'' returned to the system to strike at the planet again. This time, the TIE bombers were armed with virulent [[pathogenic bomb]]s, and intended to assault several other cities on the planet simultaneously. While the ''FarStar'' [[Battle of Kolatill|engaged]] the ''Kathol Protector'' in orbit of the planet, elements of the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette's]] [[FarStar starfighter squadron|fighter squadron]], led by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Ranna Gorjaye]] and assisted by the Kolatill Defense Force, intercepted the bombers before they could release their payloads. During the battle, Captain Ciro, who had been in transit in a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] between the ''FarStar'' and the planet when the attack had occurred, was captured by the escort [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]]. Additionally, his brother, fighter [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Noell Ciro]], purposely [[Death/Legends|sacrificed his own life]] to destroy a TIE bomber that was closing on its target by ramming it after his own craft was left without functional weapons. With its bomber force defeated, the ''Kathol Protector'' left the system.<ref name="O" />

Following the successful defense of the planet, the Kolatill Council held a memorial ceremony for those who had lost their lives in the battle. As a measure of thanks to the ''FarStar'' and her crew, the Council provided them with the coordinates to the planet Gandle Ott since they believed that Sarne was heading in that direction.<ref name="O" />

==Inhabitants==
Kolatill was home to 400 million beings, with sizeable communities of Humans, Twi'leks, and Jarells. Unhappy with the rule of the Galactic Empire, much of the population grew sympathetic to the Alliance to Restore the Republic, and its successor state, the New Republic, and openly declared their independence from the Empire at the first opportunity. Notable inhabitants included Councillor Kause, a member of the ruling [[Kolatill Council]]; [[Lon Bennor]], who organized relief efforts in Domaz following the Imperial bombing; and [[Tren (Kolatill)|Tren]], who led food distribution effort in the wake of the attack.<ref name="O" />

==Locations==
Domaz, the capital city of the planet, was an extensive urban area that included residential and capital districts, and a large park in the center.<ref name="O" /> In 8 ABY,<ref name="8 ABY Date" /> the city was attacked and devastated by TIE bombers from the Imperial escort carrier ''Kathol Protector'' in retaliation for the planet's overthrow of their Imperial governor. Much of the city's capital district was leveled, and the residential areas were severely damaged. Large areas were left in flames, and the park at the center was used as an emergency aid station and refugee camp. New Republic forces assisted in relief and recovery operations in the city several days after the initial attack.<ref name="O" />

Kolatill also had a number of other populated cities and agricultural settlements spread across the planet. In the wake of the bombing of Domaz, these cities sent aid and supplies to the capital to assist in recovery operations. During the subsequent Battle of Kolatill, these other cities were targeted for destruction by the TIE bombers from the ''Kathol Protector'' through the use of pathogenic bombs. The combined efforts of the ''FarStar''{{'s}} [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] and the Kolatill Defense Force managed to avert the destruction of any more population areas.<ref name="O" />

The main source of Kolatill's industry—the manufacture of repulsorlift vehicles and parts—was made possible by the extensive mountain ranges located in the northern hemisphere of the planet. These mountains provided the people of Kolatill with the raw materials needed to produce repulsorlift-related technology, and the majority of the planet's population centers were established in the northern hemisphere to take advantage of these natural resources.<ref name="O" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kolatill appeared in the adventure "[[Omens]]," written by [[Bill Smith]].<ref name="O" /> It was published in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', a [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]].<ref name="TDC" /> The reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', published in [[2009]], established that the [[Kolatill system/Legends|Kolatill system]] was located in grid square M-21.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
